---
name: image-generator
description: Use this when preparing TMA Platform image prompts and placeholder definitions for CMS sections. Produces premium dark editorial prompts, aspect ratios, alt text, and demo-placeholder guidance without drifting into stock-photo aesthetics.
---

# Image Generator

Use this skill when a section, page, or content library needs CMS-ready image direction.

## Produce these outputs

For each requested asset, define:
- asset purpose
- premium prompt
- exclusions or negative direction
- aspect ratio
- alt text
- demo placeholder flag

## TMA visual rules

Keep prompts aligned with:
- dark premium editorial mood
- high contrast
- modern creative-tech tone
- refined, not generic
- no cheesy stock-photo feel

Prefer prompts that feel suitable for:
- hero visuals
- case study cards
- project/news thumbnails
- team placeholders
- studio/editorial atmosphere

## CMS-ready behavior

- think in section/block context, not isolated art direction
- keep output easy to store as a replaceable placeholder asset
- clearly mark demo placeholders
- write alt text that is usable in the CMS and safe for DE/EN workflows

## Avoid

- vague “beautiful marketing image” prompts
- prompts that clash with the TMA design language
- style directions that assume a bright/light consumer brand
- placeholder definitions that are not editable later through the CMS
